# Origin - IBM Global AI Adoption Index 2023 press release

Provenance and usage record for the companion PDF in this directory.

- **Local file** - `ibm-enterprise-ai-adoption.pdf`
- **Title** - Data Suggests Growth in Enterprise Adoption of AI is Due to Widespread Deployment by Early Adopters, But Barriers Keep 40% in the Exploration and Experimentation Phases
- **Publisher** - IBM Newsroom (distributed via PRNewswire)
- **Published** - 2024-01-10, ARMONK, N.Y.
- **Source URL** - https://newsroom.ibm.com/2024-01-10-Data-Suggests-Growth-in-Enterprise-Adoption-of-AI-is-Due-to-Widespread-Deployment-by-Early-Adopters
- **Underlying research** - IBM Global AI Adoption Index 2023, conducted by Morning Consult on behalf of IBM
- **Fixture role** - basis of the `data/interim/exec-summaries/ibm-ai-adoption/` summarization fixture (source article and its exec-summary variants)

## Purpose

Retained solely for calibration and test-fixture construction in the `docdistance` project - statement segmentation, embedding, and structure-distance test material. Not redistributed, not used for model training, and not part of any published artifact. All rights remain with IBM; this local copy supports reproducible experiments only.
